Penalty Expiration Date
Unable to join a clan. $UNABLE_TO_JOIN_PLEDGE
Unable to invite a clan member. $UNABLE_TO_ACCEPT_NEW_PLEDGE_MEMBER>
Unable to create a clan. $UNABLE_TO_CREATE_PLEDGE
Unable to join an alliance. $UNABLE_TO_JOIN_ALLIANCE
Unable to invite a new alliancemember. $UNABLE_TO_ACCEPT_NEW_ALLIANCE_MEMBER
Unable to create an alliance. $UNABLE_TO_CREATE_ALLIANCE
The request to dissolve a clan isbeing processed. (Restrictionswill now apply to the use ofclan functions.) $WAITING_TO_DISMISS_PLEDGE
Unable to dissolve a clan. $UNABLE_TO_DISMISS_PLEDGE
No penalty is imposed.
